name: John Gregg
subject: It's a toss-up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gregg for Indiana
body:
This latest polls make it clear that even Republican voters are rejecting Governor Pence and his obsession with social issues -- and this race is ours for the taking.
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-2473487094202890240/-445717224263120896?utm_campaign=fnd_bwpoll_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160523_fnd_gq_bwpoll_ndn__jg
&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)
---
Peter, We've got more good news for you! A new poll conducted on behalf of a Republican organization, with a Republican-leaning sample group, shows only the narrowest of leads for Governor Pence -- a lead well within the margin of error. That's great for us. This race is a toss-up and it's ours for the taking. This latest polls make it clear that even Republican voters are rejecting Governor Pence and his obsession with social issues. Like us, they want a governor who will focus on better paying jobs, stronger schools and the issues that improve the lives of all Hoosier families. We've got TV ads running statewide now, and as more and more Hoosiers learn about me and my plan to put Indiana back on track, we have an incredible opportunity to take the lead -- but only with your help. **Will you chip in a contribution of $5 or more -- right now -- and help us turn this race from a toss-up to a win for everyday Hoosiers? Every dollar counts.** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**Express Donate: $5 ** ](https://act.myngp.com/el/-2473487094202890240/-445717224263120896?utm_campaign=fnd_bwpoll_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160523_fnd_gq_bwpoll_ndn__jg
&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&express_lane=true&amount=5)

Thanks for your support,
John Gregg

name: Josh Wolf
subject: we are in a bad place
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |

| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2380/738133e4/352e0a1c/7f827c8e/1009299937/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160523a?refcode=pme160523a_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")
---
| I'm going to be quick because there isn't a lot of time.

**We really messed up last night. We missed our goal.** With the attacks from national Republicans rolling in, the Kochs poised to pounce, and far too many people are undecided in this race, we are in a really bad place.

We can dig ourselves out, but that requires pulling in an extra $7,000 by midnight tonight. That's where you come in. We've done the math. [_**The only way we get there is if you give $5 right now. Are you in?**_](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2380/738133e4/352e0a1c/7f827c8e/1009299937/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160523a?refcode=pme160523a_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Josh |

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: dinner?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
Great food, conversation, and maybe a selfie | Friend --

**[Will you add your name for the chance to meet me for dinner on the campaign trail?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjU1NTUxODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzNDg1ODIwS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Here’s what’s on the menu: Wonderful food (I’m still thinking about the cauliflower pizza from last time!), great conversation, and maybe even time for a selfie (I’m getting pretty good at them!).

**We’ll fly you out, and you can obviously bring a friend. I’d like to see you and thank you before we move into the biggest phase of this election yet -- just add your name today:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU1NTUxODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzNDg1ODIwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Hope to see you there,

Hillary

|
**Chip in $1 to join more than 1.2 million grassroots donors standing with this campaign and be automatically entered for the chance to win dinner with Hillary:**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU1NTUxODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzNDg1ODIwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

**No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.** Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 5/20/16 and 5/31/16. Enter by contributing [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjU1NTUxODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzNDg1ODIwS0&mt=1&rt=0) or click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjU1NTUxODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzNDg1ODIwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter without contributing. One (1) winner and one (1) guest will receive a special invitation to a campaign dinner event with Hillary Clinton, round-trip airline tickets from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to the location of the campaign event and one (1) night hotel accommodation (approximate retail value of Prizes: $1,900). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU1NTUxODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzNDg1ODIwS0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201. | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU1NTUxODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzNDg1ODIwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU1NTUxODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzNDg1ODIwS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjU1NTUxODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzNDg1ODIwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU1NTUxODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzNDg1ODIwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU1NTUxODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzNDg1ODIwS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjU1NTUxODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzNDg1ODIwS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjU1NTUxODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzNDg1ODIwS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjU1NTUxODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzNDg1ODIwS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU1NTUxODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzNDg1ODIwS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU1NTUxODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzNDg1ODIwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Checking in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
Last week, we saw the strongest poll yet for our race, a tossup that could decide Senate control and the future of the Supreme Court. We're closing the gap, but just Friday, corporate special interests announced another round of new attack ads against us.
With the potential for a President Trump to nominate four Supreme Court justices, we can't afford to let Washington Republicans buy this election.
**[Please, donate $3 or every dollar you can to our Secure the Supreme Court Fund by tonight's deadline. We're falling short of our $40,000 goal-- falling short could mean falling behind, so anything you can give will make a difference.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd320/2a380d31/13db7633/f84d11/1082423292/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNTIzYW0tbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160523am-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
For too long, corporate special interests have rigged the system for themselves and against the middle class. I'm ready to change that, but I'm counting on you to help us win so I can fight for policies that benefit all of us, not just those at the top.
Please, use this link to donate before tonight's deadline: **[http://act.maggiehassan.com/secure-the-court](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd320/2a380d31/13db7633/f84d11/1082423292/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNTIzYW0tbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160523am-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd320/2a380d31/13db7633/f84d11/1082423292/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNTIzYW0tbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160523am-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd320/2a380d31/13db7633/f84d12/1082423292/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

name: Team Cole
subject: Cole Calls Out Liberal "Obstructionists"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLE
body:
| |
---
| Friend --
For six months tax and spend liberals in the legislature have been raising concerns about fully funding PEIA. However, last week when they had the chance to step up and [vote](http://www.billcolewv.com/news?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=obstructionist&n=1) for a bill that would dedicate $43 million to close the shortfall left by years of mismanagement by the PEIA Finance Board, all but one Democratic Senator, Senator Corey Palumbo, chose to vote against the bill. One thing has become clear in the first week of the special session to end the budget stalemate between Governor Earl Ray Tomblin and the legislature – the liberal Democrats plan is to prevent a budget and use it as a political issue in November. Of the three tax hikes Governor Tomblin proposed only a 45-cents increase in the tobacco tax has broad, bi-partisan support. In fact, only Senate Minority Leader Jeff Kessler was willing to put his name on the other two Tomblin proposals – a 1% increase in the consumer sales tax and an additional tax on telecommunications services. [Watch](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.statejournal.com%2FClip%2F12454068%2Fdecision-makers-52216-segment-1%23.V0HtrLma7fg.twitter&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=obstructionist&n=2) Bill Cole’s interview on _Decision Makers_ where he calls out the “obstructionists” in the legislature for their efforts to prevent a budget for political gain.

Bill Cole has been leading the fight to pass a balanced budget in a responsible manner. That includes: controlling the growth of state government first; identifying measures to control the growth of state government without harming essential services; providing new revenue through a modest increase in the tobacco tax; and using some of the taxpayer’s savings account. This balanced plan is a needed first step to providing certainty in the state’s budget for the year ahead. The next step to solving West Virginia’s fiscal crisis is electing a Governor like Bill Cole who is committed to modernizing and reforming state government with an eye towards efficiency and controlling the growth of government to reduce costs without failing to meet the needs of our citizens. Bill Cole’s opponent has offered no plan to balance the state budget and close the $270 million shortfall. Jim Justice has promised to not raise taxes or cut spending. His only solution has been to wait for the next season of _[Shark Tank](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3DiY_8pz_9LJs&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=obstructionist&n=3)_ and hope that a shark will bail him out. That’s not leadership. The need for certainty can’t wait for Jim Justice’s audition on _Shark Tank_.

TEAM COLE
[http://www.billcolewv.com/](http://www.billcolewv.com/?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=obstructionist&n=4)
---
---
| | [](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=obstructionist&n=5)
---
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.billcolewv.com/unsubscribe?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=obstructionist&n=11).
Created with [NationBuilder](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fnationbuilder.com&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=obstructionist&n=12), the essential toolkit for leaders.
clean_body: | | | Friend -- For six months tax and spend liberals in the legislature have been raising concerns about fully funding PEIA. However, last week when they had the chance to step up and for a bill that would dedicate $43 million to close the shortfall left by years of mismanagement by the PEIA Finance Board, all but one Democratic Senator, Senator Corey Palumbo, chose to vote against the bill. One thing has become clear in the first week of the special session to end the budget stalemate between Governor Earl Ray Tomblin and the legislature – the liberal Democrats plan is to prevent a budget and use it as a political issue in November. Of the three tax hikes Governor Tomblin proposed only a 45-cents increase in the tobacco tax has broad, bi-partisan support. In fact, only Senate Minority Leader Jeff Kessler was willing to put his name on the other two Tomblin proposals – a 1% increase in the consumer sales tax and an additional tax on telecommunications services. Bill Cole’s interview on Decision Makers where he calls out the “obstructionists” in the legislature for their efforts to prevent a budget for political gain. Bill Cole has been leading the fight to pass a balanced budget in a responsible manner. That includes: controlling the growth of state government first; identifying measures to control the growth of state government without harming essential services; providing new revenue through a modest increase in the tobacco tax; and using some of the taxpayer’s savings account. This balanced plan is a needed first step to providing certainty in the state’s budget for the year ahead. The next step to solving West Virginia’s fiscal crisis is electing a Governor like Bill Cole who is committed to modernizing and reforming state government with an eye towards efficiency and controlling the growth of government to reduce costs without failing to meet the needs of our citizens. Bill Cole’s opponent has offered no plan to balance the state budget and close the $270 million shortfall. Jim Justice has promised to not raise taxes or cut spending. His only solution has been to wait for the next season of and hope that a shark will bail him out. That’s not leadership. The need for certainty can’t wait for Jim Justice’s audition on Shark Tank. TEAM COLE | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLE Friends of Bill Cole · United States

name: PA Court Alert
subject: Toomey on Trump: “encouraging”
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/1437553303754899456/9059295215176646656?refcode=e20160523&refcode2=e20160523nd&amount=25)
---
**" It's a very good list." \-- _Pat Toomey on Donald Trump 's list of Supreme Court picks_
[We can't let Toomey & Trump stack the Court! Pitch in to stop them >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/1437553303754899456/9059295215176646656?refcode=e20160523&refcode2=e20160523nd&amount=25)** Friend -- Pat Toomey had one word for Donald Trump's list of ultra-conservative Supreme Court possibilities: **" encouraging."**

That's right, Toomey is willing to consider Donald Trump's Supreme Court nominees, but he's _still_ refusing to do his job and even give Judge Merrick Garland a confirmation hearing!

[**We can 't let Pat Toomey spend another six years in the Senate obstructing our government's work. Friend, will you pitch in $5 now to power Katie's campaign and take back the Senate for Democrats?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/1437553303754899456/9059295215176646656?refcode=e20160523&refcode2=e20160523nd&amount=25)

Remember, we CAN beat Toomey -- but only if we start fighting NOW. **Toomey is weakened by his Supreme Court obstruction -- a Quinnipiac poll showed that his stance is hurting him with voters.** But we need the resources to keep pressing him and keep fighting back against the right's deceitful ads!

[**Tomorrow will be too late, friend. If we want to stop Toomey and Trump, it needs to start today. Please contribute now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/1437553303754899456/9059295215176646656?refcode=e20160523&refcode2=e20160523nd&amount=25)

Thank you,

Team Katie
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/1437553303754899456/9059295215176646656?refcode=e20160523&refcode2=e20160523nd&amount=25)

name: Emily Mellencamp Smith
subject: Fwd: Checking in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Friends -- if Maggie doesn't win here in New Hampshire, we'll be stuck with another six years of Kelly Ayotte -- a Senator who has repeatedly put corporate special interests ahead of Granite State families. With the Supreme Court on the line, tonight's goal couldn't be more important.
**Democrats can't afford to sit this one out.**
But I've been crunching the numbers, and we're coming up short. Our deadline is just six hours away: **Can I tell Maggie she can count on you to give $3 or more to win in New Hampshire, take back the Senate, and stand up for Granite State families?**
You can give right now using this link: **[http://act.maggiehassan.com/secure-the-court](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd33a/2a380d31/13d9c796/f84a0c/2803241627/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNTIzcG0tbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160523pm-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks,
Emily Mellencamp Smith
Maggie for NH Finance Director

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Maggie Hassan
Date: Mon, May 23, 2016
Subject: Checking in
Friends,
Last week, we saw the strongest poll yet for our race, a tossup that could decide Senate control and the future of the Supreme Court. We're closing the gap, but just Friday, corporate special interests announced another round of new attack ads against us.
With the potential for a President Trump to nominate four Supreme Court justices, we can't afford to let Washington Republicans buy this election.
**[Please, donate $3 or every dollar you can to our Secure the Supreme Court Fund by tonight's deadline. We're falling short of our $40,000 goal-- falling short could mean falling behind, so anything you can give will make a difference.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd33a/2a380d31/13d9c796/f84a0c/2803241627/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNTIzcG0tbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160523pm-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
For too long, corporate special interests have rigged the system for themselves and against the middle class. I'm ready to change that, but I'm counting on you to help us win so I can fight for policies that benefit all of us, not just those at the top.
Please, use this link to donate before tonight's deadline: **[http://act.maggiehassan.com/secure-the-court](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd33a/2a380d31/13d9c796/f84a0c/2803241627/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNTIzcG0tbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160523pm-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd33a/2a380d31/13d9c796/f84a0d/2803241627/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Scott?=
subject: Phil Scott's 'Green Flag' Tour Sprints Into Orleans County
body:
| | | Phil Scott's 'Green Flag' Tour Sprints into Orleans County
---
[View this email in your browser](http://us13.campaign-archive1.com/?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=7b561e3d93&e=19cebfe173)
---
| |
---
| Greetings,
---
| **For Immediate Release**
Contact: Brittney Wilson
802-274-2722
**_Phil Scott's 'Green Flag' Tour Sprints into Orleans County_**
Montpelier, VT - Phil Scott's statewide Green Flag tour sprints into Orleans County tomorrow.

Scott is touring all across Vermont to discuss his plan to strengthen the economy, make Vermont more affordable and make sure the state budget does not grow faster than Vermont’s economy or Vermonters’ income. The tour also features 'Blizzard' a small passenger bus, frequently piloted by the candidate, that has been converted into a mobile campaign office.

Later this week, Scott’s tour continues into Franklin County. For more information, contact [Brittney@PhilScott.org](mailto:brittney@philscott.org).

Tuesday, May 24th Orleans County

9:00 a.m. Meet and Greet, Ethan Allen

11:30 a.m. Meet and Greet, Poulin Grain

1:30 p.m. Newport Daily Express

2:30 p.m. Meet and Greet, Columbia Forest Products

###
